prestazioni: BMW B58B30M0 (3.0L inline-6) forced-induction conversion using a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger with billet compressor wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing, and TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegate, paired with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust system by Scorpion featuring 200-cell catalytic converters and titanium resonated mufflers for optimized backpressure and sound tuning

Full Motec M150 ECU standalone management with bespoke calibration for the B58 engine, integrating a Plex Knock Monitor and AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensors, alongside a CSF high-capacity aluminum radiator and dual 12-inch SPAL puller fans for thermal management under sustained boost (targeting 18-20 psi on 98 RON fuel)

Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers with custom valving for the Morgan Plus Six’s aluminum-bonded chassis, paired with Eibach Pro-Kit springs (25% stiffer front, 30% stiffer rear) and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0115K) to eliminate compliance in the Morgan’s unique Z-frame structure, complemented by a Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable) and rear strut tower brace by Cusco
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny widebody conversion kit (Morgan Plus Six-specific) with carbon fiber fender flares, front splitter, and rear diffuser, featuring integrated LED turn signals and a 3D-printed ABS undertray for improved aerodynamics (downforce target: +45kg at 120 mph)

Custom carbon fiber hardtop with integrated Gurney flap and NACA ducts for engine bay cooling, painted in a two-tone matte Graphite Grey and gloss Black with hand-painted Morgan racing stripes (1930s Le Mans style), paired with a bespoke rear spoiler by Vorsteiner (carbon fiber, adjustable angle)

OEM+ interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber backs, Alcantara inserts), MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, suede), and a full digital dash conversion using a Race Technology DL1 data logger with AIM MXS Strada display, retaining the Morgan’s ash wood dashboard but with carbon fiber inlays and titanium shift knob by TiAL
